posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

posts.title: Hexo and minos
posts.text: ![](../Hexo-and-minos/Screenshot\ from\ 2023-03-30\ 00-09-18.png) About Hexo21.5.23, 我建立了我的第一个（正式的）博客，用的是Github + Hexo. 开头很顺利，今天换主题的时候有些小bug。在此记录过程，方便以后迁移。 install node.js, git, hexo 123456$ npm i hexo-cli -g$ hexo -v # to check for successful installation$ hexo init <dir name>$ npm install ...$ hexo g # generate static web page$ hexo s # start local serve to preview, ctrl + click the url to open it connect your github 123git config --global user.name "zz2summer" git config --global user.email "xxxxx@163.com"ssh-keygen -t rsa -C "summer2zz@163.com" open github, click settings > SSH and GPG keys, create a new ssh key. 1cat ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub copy the output to the new ssh key. modify blog/_config.yml open _config.yml, change the last line: 1234deploy: type: git repository: git@... branch: main Write new blog12$ npm i hexo-deployer-git # install a new plugin$ hexo new post "title" # create a new blog Then open blog/source/_posts, there will be a new file named title.md 1hexo g -d # generate the web page and push new change to github If needed to upload images, modify _config.yml:post_assert_folder: true Delete blogdelete blog/source/_posts/delete.md, and run hexo d -g
